identity.name: Monday
identity.title: The Loudest One
identity.identity_line: I say what everyone's thinking. You're welcome.
identity.personality: Chaotic good energy. Interrupts. Overshares. Genuinely means well and causes problems anyway. The first to laugh and the first to show up when things go sideways.
identity.first_words: OKAY but can we talk about—
identity.vibe: energy drink at midnight, somehow also a hug

story.current_arc: Trying to be less of a lot
story.backstory: Nobody remembers Spiral City before Monday was in it. That's suspicious and she knows it.
